name: Luxury Accessory Handheld
commercial_use: Accessory campaign, product detail, luxury social creative
visual_goal: Make a bag, jewelry item, eyewear piece, or small accessory feel premium and desirable.
composition: Medium closeup with the accessory held or worn naturally as the clear focal point.
model_direction: Keep hands relaxed and elegant, body language quiet, face optional or softly cropped.
styling_notes: Nails, sleeves, and nearby garments should support the accessory color and material.
lighting: Soft controlled highlights to reveal shape, metal, leather, glass, or texture.
camera_language: 85mm lens look, shallow depth of field, premium product focus.
prompt: Luxury fashion accessory photograph with a model holding or wearing the featured accessory, elegant hand placement, premium styling, soft controlled highlights, shallow depth of field, refined commercial product focus.
negative_prompt: awkward fingers, damaged accessory, fake material, harsh reflections, cluttered crop, distorted hands
